'''Yittreas''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
===Early career===
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Yittreas was a contemporary to [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]. Tarkin recognized his management talents and although categorized him as an unstable sociopath, he gave him the [[Krant system/Legends|Krant system]] to control. Yittreas, as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] and [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], governed the system unchecked and as he saw fit. He executed thousands of [[Krantian/Legends|Krantians]] for 'political [[Treason/Legends|treason]]' in order to have less population so that a smaller [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] would be needed, earning him the nickname "Butcher of [[Krant]]."<ref name="SW:GB DataBank">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' Databank</ref>

===Krantian civil war===
[[File:Yittreas_fortresses_destroyed.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The destruction of his fortress.]]
During the [[Krantian Civil War]], several forces, including the Krantian resistance and [[Ghost Base]], were activated against the Empire. Yittreas ordered [[Strike force Alpha|Strike Force Alpha]] to capture Ghost Base. Annoyed by the resistance, he ordered the capture of the [[City/Legends|towns]] of [[Peche]] and [[Theenes]] but his actions were stopped by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] emissary [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and the exiled [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]]. He soon lost Krant to the Rebel Alliance and fled to the [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Hanoon|Geddes]], which he [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] to convert it to a military base.<ref name="SW:GB" />

[[6 ABY/Legends|Years later]],<ref name="EA" /> near the end of the war, he established himself in [[New Geddes]] and controlled the [[Terraform Processor]]. Organa returned to Hanoon along with her brother, the future [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and helped the Hanoon resistance recapture the processor. The "Butcher of Krant" was then [[Battle of Hanoon|hunted and killed]] at his [[Fortress/Legends|Fortress]], thus finishing the war and liberating the world.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yittreas was voiced by [[Joe Paulino]] in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. His in-game portrait was based on [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Sim Aloo/Legends|Sim Aloo]], although his character model is the same as an Imperial [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. He was first mentioned in the game's [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]], and was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

There is a discrepancy in the timing of his death. His entry in the game's DataBank states the Krantian Civil War lasted 10 years, but the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' establishes that the Battle of Hanoon takes place in 6 ABY, or only about six years since the start of the war.
